app.name: bizbeecms
app.description: Cloudflare-native multi-site B2B whitelabel CMS — per-Site CMS instance

home.title: bizbeecms · CMS
home.intro: A whitelabel CMS instance. The ProjectManager deploys one of these per Site to Cloudflare. For now this is the default Next.js install.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Describe what you want and the assistant builds it — components, pages, translations.
chat.empty: Ask the assistant to create a component or compose a page.

contentLocales.title: Content languages
contentLocales.subtitle: The user-facing languages this site publishes content in (separate from the admin UI language).
contentLocales.addPlaceholder: Language code, e.g. fi or pt-br
contentLocales.invalidCode: Enter a valid language code (2–3 letters, optional region).
contentLocales.duplicate: That language is already in the list.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Override the published site's color tokens without a rebuild. Leave a field empty to use the default. Accepts hex (#1a2b3c) or oklch()/rgb()/hsl() values.

media.title: Media library
media.subtitle: Upload images to this site and reference them in components by their URL.
media.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF or SVG, up to {max}MB.
media.empty: No media yet. Upload an image to get started.

pages.title: Pages
pages.subtitle: Create and manage your site pages — slug, hierarchy, publish status, and per-language SEO.
pages.empty: No pages yet. Create your first page.
pages.invalidSlug: Enter a valid slug: lowercase letters, digits and hyphens.

brand.title: Brand & AI persona
brand.subtitle: Describe this Site's identity once. The AI assistant uses it to make every generated component and page match your brand.

placeholder.design: e.g. Minimal, generous whitespace, rounded cards
placeholder.aiPersona: e.g. Always suggest accessible contrast; prefer short sections

hint.brandName: The name of your brand or Site.
hint.tagline: A one-line summary of what this Site is about.
hint.voice: How copy should sound — tone and personality.
hint.design: The visual style the AI should aim for.
hint.aiPersona: Extra behavioral guidance for the AI builder.

pageBlocks.title: Edit blocks
pageBlocks.subtitle: Compose and reorder the blocks on this page:
pageBlocks.noComponents: No components yet. Create one in the AI chat first.
pageBlocks.empty: No blocks yet. Add one from the palette above.

components.title: Components
components.subtitle: Export a component as a portable bundle, or import one into this site.
components.empty: No components yet. Create one in the AI chat, then export it here.
components.importHint: Paste a component bundle JSON, or upload a .json file. Imported components are validated before saving.
components.importEmpty: Paste a bundle or choose a file first.
